target:
Big sister, look!
They're about to settle the fight over there!

Ku…!
Don't think it'll go that smoothly!
Not yet! I'm not done yet!!

Yes, I'm fine!
So hurry up and save Mio!

Over here!
I'll take care of it!
I'm glad you came from Shinpei's side.
Even a simultaneous attack won't work!?
You two! Don't forget about me!

Wait, Gil!
That kid's no good--

I told you to stop!
Can't you hear me!?

I'm sorry, Sou-kun!
It's my fault…
( A knife is wrapped in Ushio's shadow… )

I've been waiting for an opening.
You're just too strong, big sister.
If I fight normally, I'll be the one who gets hurt.

Shinpei… I'm fine!
Forget about me, save Sou!

Forget about me…
Tokiko… save her…
( I have to protect Sou no matter what… )

( Can't move…
Big shadows too, they've been sitting still since earlier )
Maybe… now that Tokiko's like this…
Tokiko, aren't you worried about Sou?
Tokiko, don't let Haine control you!

It's too late…
Even if you say that…

I'll free Tokiko and Mio from Haine's curse.
Ushio can do it!

Shin-chan, what should we do!?
Sou-kun won't answer!

Blood's spilling from my stomach…
It won't stop…

No! I don't want this! 
I don't want this!!!
I… I'll kill my big brother…

Please listen to me!
Sou loves Tokiko--

( What power! 
Can't even fight back…! )

No matter what,
It's already too late!!!

Roz, Gil, keep attacking!
I'll finish him off for sure!
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_TOK_KAGE>Anger of the Crimson Heron</color>] has been acquired.
